title: Social Signals for Degens — Trading Activity Feed & Watchlist MVP

requirements.text: Create a backend actor that stores a list of mock trading activity events, each with fields: walletAddress (Text), tokenSymbol (Text), tokenName (Text), action (Text: 'BUY' or 'SELL'), amount (Float), priceUSD (Float), network (Text: 'Monad Testnet'), timestamp (Int), and socialHandle (Text). Pre-populate with at least 8 realistic mock entries. Expose a query function to return all events sorted by timestamp descending.

quotes: focusing on the trading activity feed and watchlist first

acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor compiles and deploys without errors.
Query function returns a non-empty list of trading events sorted by newest first.
Each event includes all specified fields.

requirements.text: Create a backend actor capability to manage a user watchlist: a list of tokens identified by tokenSymbol (Text) and tokenName (Text). Expose update functions to add a token to the watchlist and remove a token from the watchlist, and a query function to retrieve the current watchlist. Prevent duplicate entries by tokenSymbol.
acceptanceCriteria: addToWatchlist function accepts tokenSymbol and tokenName and persists the entry.
removeFromWatchlist function removes the matching token.
getWatchlist query returns the current list of saved tokens.
Duplicate tokens are not added twice.

requirements.text: Build a Trading Activity Feed page as the main view. Fetch trading events from the backend and display each as a card showing: social handle, wallet address (truncated), token symbol and name, BUY/SELL badge (color-coded green/red), amount, price in USD, network label ('Monad Testnet'), and relative timestamp. Each card must include an 'Add to Watchlist' button and a 'View on DEX' button (opens a placeholder external URL).

quotes: Live trading activity feed from Farcaster social graph wallets on Monad Testnet
Action buttons: View on DEX, Add to Watchlist

acceptanceCriteria: Activity feed renders all mock events from the backend.
BUY badges are green, SELL badges are red.
Wallet addresses are truncated (e.g., 0x1234...abcd).
'Add to Watchlist' button calls the backend addToWatchlist function.
'View on DEX' button is present and opens an external link.
Feed is sorted newest first.

requirements.text: Build a Watchlist page accessible via a nav tab. Display all tokens saved to the watchlist fetched from the backend. Each watchlist entry shows token symbol, token name, and a 'Remove' button that calls the backend removeFromWatchlist function. Show an empty state message when the watchlist is empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Watchlist page fetches and displays all saved tokens.
Remove button removes the token from the backend and updates the UI.
Empty state message is shown when no tokens are saved.
Adding a token from the feed appears in the watchlist when navigating to the Watchlist page.

requirements.text: Apply a degen-crypto visual theme throughout the app: near-black dark background, neon green and magenta/pink accent colors, monospace or bold sans-serif typography, glowing card borders, and a terminal-inspired grid layout. Include a top navigation bar with the app name 'Social Signals' and tabs for 'Feed' and 'Watchlist'. Render the generated logo asset (social-signals-logo.dim_256x256.png) from frontend/public/assets/generated in the nav bar.
acceptanceCriteria: App uses a near-black dark background throughout.
Neon green and magenta accent colors are applied consistently.
Typography uses monospace or bold sans-serif fonts.
Top nav bar displays app name, logo, and two navigation tabs: Feed and Watchlist.
Cards have glowing or highlighted styled borders.
Design is visually cohesive across both pages.

constraints: Do not integrate real wallet connection, live blockchain data, or real Farcaster API calls — use mock data only.
Do not implement Copy Trade functionality in this scope.
Do not implement in-app notifications in this scope.
All Motoko logic must remain in a single backend actor.
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket or live data feeds.

required: Neon degen-style logo mark with a signal/waveform motif in green and magenta on a near-black background (social-signals-logo.dim_256x256.png)
